title: Senior GRC Specialist
summary: Senior GRC Specialist with 8 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include SOC, Nessus, Splunk, ISO 27001.
